case_title: MOHAMACH ISSAMAEL VS. JOHN JULIUS ESTACIO CAROLINO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISSAMAEL, MOHAMACH AS TO DEFENDANT CAROLINO, JOHN JULIUS ESTACIO DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-23-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-24-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-26-2002
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-07-2002. AUG-23-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION BRIEF FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISSAMAEL, MOHAMACH
REJECTION OF ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST FOR TRIAL DE NOVO BY JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CAROLINO, JOHN JULIUS ESTACIO

PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-18-2002.
ARBITRATOR HENRY HOWARD SHAIN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-25-2002 THROUGH JAN-23-2003.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISSAMAEL, MOHAMACH SERVED JUN-10-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAROLINO, JOHN JULIUS ESTACIO
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT JURY REQUESTED BY CARLINO, JOHN JULIUS ESTACIO FILED BY DEFENDANT CAROLINO, JOHN JULIUS ESTACIO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT, SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR - HENRY SHAIN
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-18-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR PER TRIAL DE NOVO FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CAROLINO, JOHN JULIUS ESTACIO
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR WILLIAM EDWARD WEISS.
ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT CAROLINO, JOHN JULIUS ESTACIO
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-18-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CORRESPONDENCE, PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, THEODORE O. BERRY TO ARBITRATOR, HENRY H. SHAIN IN RE: OUT OF COUNTRY FROM DECEMBER 23, 2002 TO JANUARY 20, 2003
